title: Fast 2 play
body:
# Modpack Features:
- **Good optimization**
- Suitable for weak PCs
- Shader support 🕹️
- Support for custom models in the resource packs (ex.Fresh Animations)
- Improved graphic and sounds feachers
- **And many other things 👀**







<details>
<summary>Сompatibility</summary>

> ### Fast2play supports the use of graphics cards with drivers that are compatible with OpenGL 4.6. Most graphics cards released in 2010 or later are compatible. This includes the following hardware:
>
> - Intel HD Graphics 500 Series (Skylake) or newer
> - Nvidia GeForce 500 Series (Fermi) or newer
> - AMD Radeon HD 7000 Series (GCN 1) or newer
> - In some cases, older graphics cards may also work (as long as they have drivers which support OpenGL 3.3) but they are not officially supported and may not be compatible in the future.

</details>

<details>
<summary>RU</summary>

# Фишки модпака:
- **Хорошая оптимизация**
- Подходит для слабых ПК
- Поддержка шейдеров 🕹️
- Поддержка пользовательских моделей в пакетах ресурсов (например, Fresh Animations) 
- Улучшения в визуале и звуках
- **И многое другое 👀**

<details>
<summary>Реклама</summary>
  
## Лучший сервер, который добавляет уйму нового контента абсолютно без модов!
![advert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d31a166ea21d9936582a7734154e9ce2c07ef8d9.png)
## [Перейти](https://discord.gg/Jbg4S8XMez)

</details>


</details>
